opportunities_rejected: broad crowded appliance niches with weak differentiation
opportunities_approved: narrower lower-competition Singapore comparison-page categories as current pilot direction
patterns_learned: dataset-first discovery is the correct discovery model
SERP structure plus weak-competitor analysis is required before qualification
research must output a clear page blueprint, not just a score
gatekeeper should reject aggressively before planner work starts

validated_opportunities: narrower utility/product categories are stronger pilot targets than broad mainstream appliance terms for Singapore comparison pages
reusable_rejection_reasons: reject if search volume is below 300
reject if product price is below 30 dollars equivalent
reject if affiliate path is unavailable or unclear
reject if SERP is dominated by strong unassailable authorities with no visible weakness
serp_patterns: beatable SERPs often contain thin blogs, outdated comparisons, and pages missing structured spec tables
confirmed_monetization_sources: Amazon SG when relevant to the category
dataset_structures: comparison pages work best when the dataset includes price, specs, merchant availability, and features
proven_page_blueprints: introduction, quick comparison table, top options, price comparison, pros and cons, where to buy, buying guide, FAQs
